title: Snarlf horse
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Snarlf_horse.jpg|thumb|250px|Wicket and Teebo ride a snarlf horse.]]
'''Snarlf horses''' were creatures very similar to [[Bordok/Legends|bordoks]] that grazed on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]].

[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] and [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] once rode a snarlf horse into [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] to warn [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] of an impending flood.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Return of the Great One!|book=Ewoks Annual}} {{1st}}
